turns.diag_fed: {"severity":"error","code":"expected","at":{"line":8,"col":8},"expected":"}","actual":"Comma","repair":{"id":"fix-syntax","summary":"correct the syntax at the span","replacement":[{"line":8,"new":"  (name, num)"},{"line":16,"new":"total = entries | map .1 | sum\nprint \"names: {entries | map .0 | join ', '}\""}]}}
turns.reply:
```curt
check val = if val > 84 { err "limit" } else { val }

lines = fs.read "data.txt" ? "alice 10\nbob 30\ncarol 50"
entries = lines.lines | map line -> {
  parts = line.split " "
  name = parts[0]
  num = parts[1].int
  (name, num)
}

print "--- arithmetic ---"
result = 3 + 84.5
print "3 + 84.5 = {result}"

print "--- aggregation ---"
total = entries | map .1 | sum
print "names: {entries | map .0 | join ', '}"
print "total: {total}"
avg = total.float / entries.len.float
print "average: {avg}"

print "--- match with err ---"
tests = [42, 84, 85, 100, 10]
for val in tests {
  outcome = match (check val) {
    err e -> "rejected {val}: {e}"
    int n -> "accepted {n}"
  }
  print outcome
}
```

{"severity":"error","code":"type_mismatch","at":{"line":18,"col":1},"callee":"{label str, score int, active bool}","repair":{"id":"align-types","summary":"make the operand types agree","replacement":[{"line":19,"new":"  {label: "apple",  score: 3, active: true},
  {label: "banana", score: 7, active: false},
  {label: "cherry", score: 5, active: true},
  {label: "date",   score: 9, active: true},"}]}}
turns.reply:
```curt
lines = fs.read "data.txt" ? "alice 10\nbob 20\nalice 5\nbob 15\ncarol 8"

records = lines.lines | map ln -> {
  parts = ln.split " "
  name = parts[0]
  num = parts[1].int ? 0
  {name: name, num: num}
}

for g in records.group .name {
  total = g.v | map .num | sum
  print "{g.k}: {total}"
}

grand = records | map .num | sum
print "total: {grand}"

items = [
  {label: "apple", score: 3, active: true},
  {label: "banana", score: 7, active: false},
  {label: "cherry", score: 5, active: true},
  {label: "date", score: 9, active: true},
  {label: "elderberry", score: 2, active: false}
]

result = items | keep .active | map x -> "{x.label}({x.score})" | join ", "
print "active items: {result}"

top_score = items | keep .active | top 1 .score | map .label | join ""
print "top active: {top_score}"
```

# Read data.txt and aggregate
raw = fs.read "data.txt" ? ""
lines = raw.lines | keep x -> x.trim.len > 0
total = lines | fold 0.0 acc line -> {

  num = (float parts[1]) ? 0.0
  acc + num
}
print "total: {total}"

  parts = line.split " "
  name = parts[0]
  num = (float parts[1]) ? 0.0
  print "{name}: {num}"
}
